metadata.description: Curated state-level flagship schemes, development indicators, and key policy actions

flagship_schemes.name: Ladki Bahin Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 1,500/month cash transfer to women aged 21-65 with income below Rs 2.5 lakh

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin
flagship_schemes.description: Women's empowerment scheme — financial assistance, skilling, entrepreneurship support

flagship_schemes.name: Jalyukt Shivar Abhiyan 2.0
flagship_schemes.description: Watershed development and water conservation in drought-prone districts

flagship_schemes.name: Mumbai-Nagpur Samruddhi Mahamarg
flagship_schemes.description: 701 km expressway connecting Mumbai and Nagpur via Nashik, Aurangabad, Amravati

key_policies.title: Maharashtra Right to Services Act extended to 400+ services
Industrial policy 2024: Target $1 trillion state economy by 2028
Maharashtra EV Policy — 25% subsidy on EVs, charging infra mandate

flagship_schemes.name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 1,000/month to women heads of households — 1.06 crore beneficiaries

flagship_schemes.name: Chief Minister's Breakfast Scheme
flagship_schemes.description: Free breakfast for government primary school students (Classes 1-5)

flagship_schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Climate Change Mission
flagship_schemes.description: Green Tamil Nadu Mission — coastal resilience, urban flooding, renewable energy targets

flagship_schemes.name: SIPCOT Industrial Parks Expansion
flagship_schemes.description: 5 new industrial parks for electronics, EV, and semiconductor manufacturing

key_policies.title: Tamil Nadu Startup Policy 2.0 — TIDCO fund of Rs 500 crore
Universal health coverage via CMCHIS — expanded to all residents
Free bus travel for women extended to town buses

flagship_schemes.name: Gruha Lakshmi
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 2,000/month to women heads of BPL/APL households — 1.2 crore beneficiaries

flagship_schemes.name: Shakti (Free Bus Travel for Women)
flagship_schemes.description: Free travel on KSRTC and BMTC buses for all women

flagship_schemes.name: Anna Bhagya (10 kg Free Rice)
flagship_schemes.description: 10 kg free rice per BPL household per month, expanded from 7 kg

flagship_schemes.name: Yuva Nidhi
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 3,000-5,000/month to unemployed graduates for 2 years while job-seeking

key_policies.title: Karnataka Semiconductor Policy — 50% subsidy on land, stamp duty waiver
Bengaluru Suburban Rail Project — Rs 15,767 crore approved
Farm loan waiver up to Rs 2 lakh for 50 lakh farmers

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sarvhit Bima Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Accident and disability insurance for farmers — Rs 5 lakh coverage

flagship_schemes.name: UP Defence Corridor
flagship_schemes.description: 6-node defence manufacturing corridor: Aligarh-Agra-Jhansi-Chitrakoot-Kanpur-Lucknow

flagship_schemes.name: Kanya Sumangala Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 15,000 in 6 instalments from birth to graduation for girl children

flagship_schemes.name: UP Expressway Industrial Development Authority
flagship_schemes.description: Ganga Expressway (594 km), Bundelkhand Expressway (296 km) — connecting Tier 2/3 cities

key_policies.title: UP IT & Startup Policy 2.0 — incentives for data centres, AI labs
One District One Product scheme expanded to 75 districts
UP Solar Energy Policy — 10 GW solar target by 2027

flagship_schemes.name: GIFT City IFSC Expansion
flagship_schemes.description: International Financial Services Centre — 300+ entities, IFSCA regulatory framework

flagship_schemes.name: Dholera Smart City SIR
flagship_schemes.description: 920 sq km Special Investment Region — India's first greenfield smart city

flagship_schemes.name: Gujarat Semiconductor Policy
flagship_schemes.description: Capital subsidy + land + power incentives for semiconductor fabs (Vedanta-Foxconn, Micron)

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Interest-free loans up to Rs 1 lakh for women SHGs

key_policies.title: Gujarat Green Hydrogen Hub — Kutch, 30 GW electrolysis target
New Gujarat Industrial Policy 2025 — PLI-style state incentives
Gujarat Maritime Cluster at GIFT City for blue economy

flagship_schemes.name: Lakshmir Bhandar
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 500-1,000/month to women heads of households — 2.1 crore beneficiaries. Largest state DBT scheme.

flagship_schemes.name: Kanyashree Prakalpa
flagship_schemes.description: Conditional cash transfer for girls' education (UN award-winning) — Rs 750/year + Rs 25,000 at 18

flagship_schemes.name: Swasthya Sathi
flagship_schemes.description: Universal health insurance — Rs 5 lakh/family/year. Covers 10 crore beneficiaries. Replaced PM-JAY in WB.

flagship_schemes.name: Duare Sarkar (Government at Doorstep)
flagship_schemes.description: Mobile camps delivering 12+ government services at ward/village level — 6 crore applications processed

key_policies.title: Bengal Silicon Valley Hub at New Town — IT/ITES incentive package
Krishak Bandhu — Rs 10,000/year income support to farmers
Student Credit Card — interest-free education loans up to Rs 10 lakh

flagship_schemes.name: Chiranjeevi Health Insurance
flagship_schemes.description: Universal health insurance — Rs 25 lakh/family/year. Free for all families. Among India's most generous.

flagship_schemes.name: Rising Rajasthan Investment Summit Commitments
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 35 lakh crore MoU signed at Rising Rajasthan 2024 across 24 sectors

flagship_schemes.name: Rajasthan Renewable Energy Policy
flagship_schemes.description: Target: 90 GW renewable energy by 2030. India's largest solar park belt in Jaisalmer-Barmer.

key_policies.title: Rajasthan Platform-Based Gig Workers Act — India's first gig worker law
Rajasthan Right to Health Act — universal healthcare as right
Eastern Rajasthan Canal Project (ERCP) — Rs 40,000 crore

flagship_schemes.name: LIFE Mission (Livelihood Inclusion Financial Empowerment)
flagship_schemes.description: Houses for all homeless and landless — 3.27 lakh houses completed

flagship_schemes.name: Kerala Fibre Optic Network (KFON)
flagship_schemes.description: Free internet as right — 20 lakh BPL families get free broadband. 30,000 km fibre laid.

flagship_schemes.name: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM)
flagship_schemes.description: India's first state startup policy. 4,000+ startups, 65,000+ jobs. 7 technology parks.

flagship_schemes.name: SilverLine Semi-High-Speed Rail
flagship_schemes.description: Thiruvananthapuram-Kasaragod 530 km semi-high-speed corridor — currently in planning/approval phase

key_policies.title: Kerala Migrant Workers Welfare Scheme — Apna Ghar hostels, health cover
Kerala Climate Change Adaptation Mission — resilience after 2018/2024 floods
Social Security Pension — Rs 1,600/month to 60 lakh elderly/disabled/widowed

flagship_schemes.name: Ladli Behna Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 1,250/month to women aged 23-60 — 1.3 crore beneficiaries. Pioneer of state DBT-to-women model.

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Seekho Kamao Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Stipend-based apprenticeship for youth — Rs 8,000-10,000/month during on-the-job training

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Jan Kalyan Sambal Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Free electricity (100 units), insurance, pension for unorganised workers

key_policies.title: MP Global Investors Summit 2025 — Rs 27 lakh crore MoUs signed
Narmada Basin water harvesting — 10 lakh structures target
MP Ethanol Production Policy — sugarcane belt incentives

flagship_schemes.name: Rythu Bharosa (formerly Rythu Bandhu)
flagship_schemes.description: Restructured farm income support — Rs 10,000/acre/year for landholding farmers. Inspired PM-KISAN.

flagship_schemes.name: Rajiv Arogyasri (Health Insurance)
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 10 lakh/family/year health insurance — one of India's most generous state health schemes

flagship_schemes.name: Hyderabad Metro Rail Phase II
flagship_schemes.description: 76.4 km extension across 3 corridors — Airport, Old City, IT corridor connectivity

flagship_schemes.name: Musi Riverfront Development
flagship_schemes.description: Comprehensive river restoration — sewage treatment, rehabilitation, waterfront development

key_policies.title: Telangana AI Mission (AI City at Hyderabad)
Young India Skills University — first of its kind
Farm loan waiver up to Rs 2 lakh — 22 lakh farmers

flagship_schemes.name: Aam Aadmi Clinic
flagship_schemes.description: 850+ mohalla clinics providing free primary healthcare — OPD, diagnostics, 100+ medicines

flagship_schemes.name: 300 Units Free Electricity
flagship_schemes.description: 300 units free electricity per household per month — universal, not income-targeted

flagship_schemes.name: Schools of Eminence
flagship_schemes.description: 117 government schools upgraded to international standards — English medium, smart classrooms

key_policies.title: Punjab Doorstep Delivery of Services — 43 services at home
Stubble burning reduction — 30% decline via ex-situ management incentive
Industrial & Business Development Policy 2022 — focus on MSMEs

flagship_schemes.name: Bihar Special Status Demand
flagship_schemes.description: Persistent demand for Special Category Status — central grants for infrastructure, industry

flagship_schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 54,100 total from birth to graduation for girls — incentivising education, delaying marriage

flagship_schemes.name: Bihar Student Credit Card
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 4 lakh education loans at 4% interest for higher education — 4.5 lakh beneficiaries

flagship_schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Hariyali Abhiyan
flagship_schemes.description: Tree planting, pond rejuvenation, water harvesting — Bihar's flagship environment programme

key_policies.title: Bihar caste census — first comprehensive socio-economic survey
75% reservation in private jobs for Bihar domiciles
Bihar Liquor Prohibition — full ban since 2016, upheld by Supreme Court

flagship_schemes.name: Orunodoi Scheme
flagship_schemes.description: Rs 1,250/month to women in BPL families — 37 lakh beneficiaries

flagship_schemes.name: Assam Micro Finance Loan Waiver
flagship_schemes.description: Waiver of microfinance loans up to Rs 25,000 for 26 lakh women borrowers

flagship_schemes.name: Mission Basundhara
flagship_schemes.description: Land rights — digitised 2.5 crore land records, distributed 3 lakh land pattas to indigenous communities

key_policies.title: Assam Accord implementation — updated NRC, Clause 6 committee recommendations
Assam Cancer Care Foundation — 17 cancer hospitals being built
Kaziranga Landscape Conservation Plan
